title: trifolium creticum
intro: Trifolium creticum, also known as Cretan clover, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Fabaceae family, native to the island of Crete in Greece. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and urinary problems, due to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Trifolium creticum include alleviating symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, reducing inflammation and pain, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Trifolium creticum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
